name: 90 Minute Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour water into a bowl and sprinkle the yeast over it. Sprinkle sugar and salt over the yeast and wait until the yeast bubbles and comes to the surface.
2. Stir in the oil. Add 4 cups of flour all at once. Mix with a wooden spoon until dough gathers together in a ball.
3. Scrape down the sides of the bowl, incorporating any dough particles. If the dough is sticky, add additional flour until it can be handled easily.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured board and divide into two loaves. Shape each loaf and place into greased bread pans, covering with a wet dish towel.
5. When the bread has doubled in bulk, bake at 375°F (190°C) in a preheated oven for 30-35 minutes until brown.
6. Turn the bread onto a rack to cool.
